tagline: Quality carpentry. Transparent communication. Built to last.
subtagline: SGM Carpentry treats every renovation as a meaningful transition. From design through completion, you get consistent updates, meticulous craftsmanship, and solutions that respect your home and timeline.
aboutBlurb: Founded to fill a gap in BC's renovation market, SGM Carpentry partners with homeowners through every phase of their project. Owner Sean brings hands-on experience and a commitment to clear communication, structural integrity, and finishes that endure. Whether it's a kitchen rebuild or a full home renovation, SGM handles scope with care and delivers results that reflect your vision.

services.name: Residential Carpentry
services.description: Custom framing, trim work, built-ins, and structural repairs tailored to your home's unique demands.

services.name: Kitchen & Bath Renovations
services.description: Complete kitchen and bathroom overhauls: cabinetry, layout redesign, plumbing coordination, and finishing.

services.name: Whole-Home Renovations
services.description: Multi-phase projects from concept through handoff. Coordinated trades, staged timelines, transparent budgets.

services.name: Decks & Exterior Carpentry
services.description: Durable outdoor structures: decks, fencing, pergolas, and siding repairs using weather-resistant materials.

services.name: Flooring Installation & Repair
services.description: Hardwood, laminate, and tile installation; subfloor assessment and replacement.

industryContext: Renovation contractors in BC lose 30-40% of qualified leads to slow response times and poor follow-up. Homeowners often feel abandoned after initial contact, leading to decision drift toward competitors. Unmanaged estimates and reviews create friction that erodes referrals — a carpentry business's lifeblood.
painPoints: Missed calls and delayed responses cause leads to shop competitors
Homeowners struggle to understand project scope and timelines without regular updates
Estimates sit unanswered; follow-up requires manual effort and tracking
Review and referral management falls through the cracks during active projects

tourSteps.title: Answer Calls 24/7
tourSteps.text: Prospects reach your chatbot anytime. It qualifies leads, books consultations, and routes urgent messages — no more missed opportunities.

tourSteps.title: Show Your Range
tourSteps.text: Display residential carpentry, renovations, decks, and flooring in one place. Prospects see your full scope without confusion.

tourSteps.title: Automate Follow-Up
tourSteps.text: Estimates auto-follow up after 3 days. Reviews are collected and published without extra work. Stay top-of-mind while you're on the job.

tourSteps.title: Convert & Retain
tourSteps.text: Missed calls trigger texts. Satisfied clients generate referrals through automated review requests. Your phone and reputation work for you.
